6:
WITH cust_2013 AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment,
         SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
    AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) = '2013'
  GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_total AS (
  SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
  FROM cust_2013
),
least_customers AS (
  SELECT CustomerID, Segment, total_consumption
  FROM cust_2013
  WHERE total_consumption = (SELECT min_total FROM min_total)
),
annual_avg AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         AVG(total_consumption / 12.0) AS avg_annual_consumption
  FROM least_customers
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN avg_annual_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN avg_annual_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN avg_annual_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN avg_annual_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN avg_annual_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN avg_annual_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM annual_avg;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT Segment AS segment,
           pct_increase AS percentage_increase,
           'biggest' AS type
    FROM (
        SELECT Segment,
               CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                    ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
               END AS pct_increase
        FROM (
            SELECT Segment,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2012,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2013
            FROM (
                SELECT c.Segment,
                       strftime('%Y', ym.Date) AS yr,
                       SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
                FROM yearmonth ym
                JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
                WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
                  AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) IN ('2012','2013')
                GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
            )
            GROUP BY Segment
        )
    )
    WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY pct_increase DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
UNION ALL
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT Segment AS segment,
           pct_increase AS percentage_increase,
           'lowest' AS type
    FROM (
        SELECT Segment,
               CASE WHEN cons_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                    ELSE (cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0 / cons_2012
               END AS pct_increase
        FROM (
            SELECT Segment,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2012,
                   MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN total_cons END) AS cons_2013
            FROM (
                SELECT c.Segment,
                       strftime('%Y', ym.Date) AS yr,
                       SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_cons
                FROM yearmonth ym
                JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
                WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
                  AND strftime('%Y', ym.Date) IN ('2012','2013')
                GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
            )
            GROUP BY Segment
        )
    )
    WHERE pct_increase IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY pct_increase ASC
    LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH oldest_female AS (
  SELECT MIN(birth_date) AS min_birth
  FROM client
  WHERE gender = 'F'
),
female_oldest AS (
  SELECT c.client_id, c.district_id
  FROM client c
  JOIN oldest_female o ON c.birth_date = o.min_birth
  WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
female_oldest_salary AS (
  SELECT fo.client_id, d.A10 AS avg_salary
  FROM female_oldest fo
  JOIN district d ON fo.district_id = d.district_id
),
min_salary AS (
  SELECT MIN(avg_salary) AS min_sal
  FROM female_oldest_salary
),
max_salary AS (
  SELECT MAX(A10) AS max_sal
  FROM district
),
gap_calc AS (
  SELECT (max_sal - min_sal) AS salary_gap
  FROM max_salary, min_salary
)
SELECT a.account_id, g.salary_gap
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN female_oldest_salary fos ON d.client_id = fos.client_id
JOIN min_salary ms ON fos.avg_salary = ms.min_sal
CROSS JOIN gap_calc g;	----- bird -----	financial
